name: web-ux-testing
description: Agent workflows, skills, schemas, and scripts for planning, running, and reporting web UX tests.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, run, and report structured web UX tests.
interface.longDescription: Agent workflows, reusable scenarios, validation schemas, and utility scripts for generating web UX test plans, executing browser-based exploratory checks, converting stable findings into Playwright regression tests, and producing engineering-ready reports.
defaultPrompt: Create a web UX testing plan for this app.
Run the validated web UX scenarios with Playwright MCP.
Convert confirmed UX findings into Playwright tests.
